subject: fix(pwa): improve update check UX — immediate feedback, error handling
body:
Three issues in the initial implementation:
1. "Checking..." label was invisible — menu closes before check starts
2. Network errors falsely reported "up to date" instead of an error
3. No immediate feedback — 1.5s silence after tap

Fix: checkForUpdates() now returns 'found' | 'up-to-date' | 'error'
discriminated union. BurgerMenu shows immediate "Checking..." toast,
then replaces it with the appropriate result message. Removed unused
isChecking destructure since the menu is closed during the check.

Tags: pwa, ux, bug-fix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-updates
Semver: patch
